top_tweets.text: Something I’ve always loved about Reze’s design is her eyes. They’re beautiful and vibrant, but there’s also a softness to them. For a character who tries to hide her identity, her eyes feel like a window into her true self. I’ve wondered how Fujimoto made them feel so distinct. https://t.co/icAmCr7cjh

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
